cases.shortDescription: Arrested for allegedly suffocating 6-year-old Nishat to death in Mohonpur, Brahmanbaria.
cases.description: According to PBI, Ishaq Mia allegedly suffocated 6-year-old Nishat by pressing a vest over her mouth, causing death by asphyxiation. The victim's body was later recovered in a sack near her residence. Ishaq Mia was arrested by PBI and remains in custody while the investigation continues.

timeline.title: Suspect identified
timeline.detail: PBI identified Ishaq Mia as the primary suspect.

timeline.title: Evidence collected
timeline.detail: Investigators recovered the vest allegedly used in the killing.

timeline.title: Arrested
timeline.detail: Ishaq Mia was arrested by PBI.

cases.name: Ishaq Mia
